title: Don't be fooled by the UK's pre-war inflation print — a 'brutal' surge could be coming
summary_full: The U.K. inflation rate stood firm at 3% in February, according to the latest figures from the Office for National Statistics (ONS).
summary_public: The U.K. inflation rate stood firm at 3% in February, according to the latest figures from the Office for National Statistics (ONS).

GB.label: neutral
